metadata.rationale: The article is broadly grounded in a real NATO spending message and a real political debate over burden-sharing, but it overstates how decisively the new figures settle U.S. complaints. It also pairs the report with an editorial cartoon whose accusatory tone pushes a stronger anti-Trump interpretation than the text itself substantiates.
